mapper.insert: insert into h_complaint (username, gym_id, title, content, create_at) values (#{username}, #{gymId}, #{title}, #{content}, CURRENT_DATE)
mapper.select: select complain_id as complainId, username, gym_id as gymId, title, content, create_at as createAt, status from h_complaint where username = #{username} order by complain_id desc
select complain_id as complainId, username, gym_id as gymId, title, content, create_at as createAt, status from h_complaint where gym_id = #{gymId} order by complain_id desc
select complain_id as complainId, username, gym_id as gymId, title, content, create_at as createAt, status from h_complaint where complain_id = #{complaintId}
